data.q: direct manipulation positive rows matched controls

items.name: Replication Data for: lobbying-position
items.description: This Dataverse contains the replication dataset for the paper "Measuring Interest Group Positions on Legislation: An AI-Driven Analysis of Lobbying Reports". It includes input and output data used in the study. The source code and additional documentation are available on GitHub: https://github.com/hikoseon12/lobbying-position.
items.citationHtml: Kim, Jiseon, 2025, "Replication Data for: lobbying-position", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/D0QWM2, Harvard Dataverse, V2
items.citation: Kim, Jiseon, 2025, "Replication Data for: lobbying-position", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/D0QWM2, Harvard Dataverse, V2

items.name: Replication Data for: Propensity Scores Have Non-paradoxical Performance in Matching Under Real-world Conditions
items.description: Data, code, and figures to accompany a letter to Political Analysis commenting on matching methods. There are 5 simulations and an EDA of King and Nielsen (2018). Each simulation has several hundred data sets.
items.citationHtml: Miller, Jason, 2020, "Replication Data for: Propensity Scores Have Non-paradoxical Performance in Matching Under Real-world Conditions", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/RHLMJD, Harvard Dataverse, V1
items.citation: Miller, Jason, 2020, "Replication Data for: Propensity Scores Have Non-paradoxical Performance in Matching Under Real-world Conditions", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/RHLMJD, Harvard Dataverse, V1

items.name: Direct-MSM-Droplet
items.description: 17-glycine-based peptide in a droplet of 1900 TIP3P water molecules. Direct electrostatics is validated by comparing with MSM method.
items.citationHtml: Nguyen, Han, 2024, "Direct-MSM-Droplet", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/Y6K4FA, Harvard Dataverse, V1
items.citation: Nguyen, Han, 2024, "Direct-MSM-Droplet", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/Y6K4FA, Harvard Dataverse, V1

items.name: Replication Data for: Feedback and Education Improve Human Detection of Image Manipulation on Social Media
items.description: This contains all the datasets and files required for replicating the results in the paper "Feedback and Education Improve Human Detection of Image Manipulation on Social Media".

items.name: Base pair to Bin Matching
items.description: A list of papers including the base pair studied along with a corresponding p-value for the hypothesis tested is cross-referenced with a list of bins. The objective is to identify the corresponding bin of each base pair and return the smallest p-value for each one.
items.citationHtml: Andreou, Arys; Rikos, Dimitris, 2019, "Base pair to Bin Matching", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/8CZSMB, Harvard Dataverse, V1, UNF:6:mWL25rJvJXIL7vCnBsXQOQ== [fileUNF]
